price: Gewiß, Allah ist der Versorger, der Besitzer von Kraft und der Feste .
arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلۡقُوَّةِ ٱلۡمَتِينُ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: inna al-laha huwa al-razāqu dhū al-quwati al-matīnu
